author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: Daily goals, Pomodoro sessions, study logs, weekly progress reports, and join-to-create study rooms for Red-DiscordBot.
install_msg: Load the cog, configure channels with `[p]studyset`, then run `[p]studyset status`. Review temporary voice-room permissions before enabling join-to-create.
short: Study automation and temporary study rooms.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild configuration, Discord user/channel/voice-room IDs, study goals, Pomodoro session state, study-log entries, and progress data required to provide its productivity features.
